description_long: This is a polygonal cup with a distinctive, multicolored, horizontally striped pattern that resembles a woolen or knitted texture. The cup features a prominent, angular handle attached to one side, and the body is faceted rather than perfectly round, giving it a geometric appearance. The color bands include shades of red, navy blue, mustard yellow, light blue, and brown, arranged in a repeating sequence around the exterior. The surface appears soft and textured, mimicking the look of yarn or felt, rather than traditional ceramic or metal. The interior of the cup is visible and appears to be lined with the same material as the exterior. The base is flat, allowing the cup to stand upright on flat surfaces.
description: A faceted cup with a bold, multicolored, wool-like striped pattern and an angular handle, featuring a soft, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and the full display of the horizontal striped pattern.
description_view_1: Side view without the handle, highlighting the uninterrupted striped pattern and the faceted body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle on the right, showing a vertical seam in the pattern and the cup's polygonal shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle partially visible, emphasizing the geometric facets and color bands.
